## Proof

- [ ] Tests or deterministic checks added or updated
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm pack:release && pnpm pack:verify` passes when packaging changes
- [ ] Runtime capability changes include conformance coverage
- [ ] Protocol changes include schemas and fixtures
- [ ] User-visible changes update all five README guides

Describe anything that was not verified.
